description_long: This is a medium-sized potted plant with broad, dark green leaves arranged in clusters on several slender, brown stems. The leaves have a slightly angular, faceted appearance, and some clusters feature small, berry-like elements in shades of red and yellow, suggesting a flowering or fruiting species. The plant is housed in a faceted, polygonal pot with a matte gray finish, giving it a modern, geometric look. The pot is tall and tapers slightly towards the base, providing stability. The overall structure is airy, with visible gaps between the stems and leaves, allowing light to pass through. This plant would be suitable for decorative use in urban interiors or sheltered outdoor spaces.
description: A modern potted plant with broad, dark green leaves and small red-yellow berry clusters, set in a faceted gray pot. The plant has a geometric, airy structure and a contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of broad leaves and visible berry clusters, with the faceted pot clearly displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plant's narrow profile and the vertical arrangement of leaves, with fewer berry clusters visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the leaf clusters and pot, with berry clusters partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the vertical alignment of leaves and a prominent berry cluster, with the pot's shape still visible.
attribute_plant_species: Schefflera (umbrella plant) or similar broadleaf houseplant
